sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the established template, self-audited before commit. Covers the three registres (familier/courant/soutenu: lexical triplets bagnole-voiture-automobile etc., grammatical markers, the comic mismatch effect), formal antonym pairs (belliqueux/pacifique, opaque/transparent, abonder/manquer…), and the droit de réponse formal-letter conventions. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego B2 (Hachette), Dossier 8 'Singularités' ('Registres de langue' + 'Les antonymes', p.122; 'Droit de réponse', p.116). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
